commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=40031c37c0eb0a320aa2f1c6d367c6b38d23b1a8)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an `auto` value for `agents.*.experimental.localModelLean`, threads context caps into tool inventory/tool construction, and updates docs, schemas, generated baselines, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +42, Tests +149, Docs 0, Generated 0. Total +191 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible for the review finding: the native slash command path can pass `contextTokens: 0`, and the changed inventory expression keeps that `0` before model-context fallback. I did not run a live channel turn in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow mechanical repair remains: normalize positive context-cap fallback and add regression coverage; draft/stack readiness stays maintainer controlled.

target.title: feat(agents): auto-trim lean local tools
target.body:
Summary:
- Adds `agents.*.experimental.localModelLean: "auto"` so lean local tool trimming activates only for models/effective context caps at 64K tokens or smaller.
- Threads the effective context cap through embedded attempts, tool construction, `/tools`, and effective tool inventory so runtime and surfaced tool lists agree.
- Updates config schemas/help, generated baselines, and local-model docs for the new auto mode.

Depends on:
- https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88780 for current-main changed-gate lint cleanup. This PR is stacked on that branch so the diff here stays focused on local-model lean auto mode.

Verification:
- `node scripts/docs-list.js`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.test.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.types.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-info.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-runtime.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.test.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.types.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-info.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-runtime.ts`
- `node --import tsx scripts/generate-config-doc-baseline.ts --check`
- `node --max-old-space-size=8192 --import tsx scripts/generate-plugin-sdk-api-baseline.ts --check`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` (clean before final restack; no accepted/actionable findings)

Remote proof status:
- AWS Crabbox attempt `run_984d6afede57` failed before lease creation: `cost_limit_exceeded`, monthly budget `$25002.21/$25000.00`.
- Crabbox Blacksmith-Testbox fallback failed before lease creation: not authenticated; `blacksmith auth login` required.
- Earlier AWS Crabbox run `run_1f8f15af33a7` reached `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs`; typecheck passed and the only failure was current-main lint in `src/channels/message/ingress-queue.ts` / `src/plugins/registry.ts`, now isolated in PR #88780.

Behavior addressed: local-model lean mode can now be set to auto-trim heavyweight tools only for small effective context caps instead of forcing operators to choose globally between full tools and always-lean tools.
Real environment tested: local focused Vitest/schema/docs/baseline/lint checks; AWS Crabbox changed gate progressed through core/core-test typecheck before hitting current-main lint now moved to PR #88780.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: see Verification and Remote proof status above.
Evidence after fix: focused tests passed 155 total assertions across 5 files; generated config and plugin SDK baselines check clean; autoreview clean.
Observed result after fix: `"auto"` enables lean filtering at 64K tokens or smaller, stays off above that cap, and effective tool inventory uses `contextTokenBudget`, then `runtimeModel.contextTokens`, then `runtimeModel.contextWindow`.
What was not tested: final full remote `pnpm check:changed`, blocked by AWS Crabbox budget and missing Blacksmith auth.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
